column1: _____ people swim in the sea in the winter.

Can I speak to you for ____ minutes?

I’m going shopping. I need to buy ____ things for tonight’s party.
I need ______ money. Can you give me some?
I can’t wait for you. I’ve got ____ time.
There is _____ snow on the ground. The children can’t make a snowman.
Susan has ________ friends. She doesn’t feel lonely.
